form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 400m at this track beaten 10 lengths (23.49) behind Titan's Ocean in a Grade 5 on April 11. Yet to win but has been in the money two times from four starts off this box. Right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels on the turn on to the back straight.

form.formComment: Was well fancied on debut and opened winning account with a 1.3 lengths win at Bendigo over 425m (24.36). Back in great order and makes plenty of appeal again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (23.23) over 400m at this track. Aided by a low draw and is worth plenty of thought.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 13 over 400m at Maitland behind Cha Cha Ethics beaten 2 lengths (22.74). Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 14 over 388m at Gosford in a Grade 5. Others read better.

formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 14 over 388m at Gosford in a Grade 5. Others read better.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (23.05) at this track over 400m. Has never missed the frame in three starts from this box. Definite chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered in the front straight and bumped.
Came together entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 13 over 400m at Maitland behind Cha Cha Ethics beaten 5 lengths (22.93). Has ability and among the chances.

form.formComment: Lifted to win two runs back and scored again last start over 400m at this track (22.90,) beating Wonky Key Donkey. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time. Worth following up.
